data.body: Investigation (cluster C, sonnet, KERNEL): Taxonomy #10 Brittle API Mapping + #16 Instruction Locality. ROOT_CAUSE: CLAUDE.md named-agent dispatch table lists `dso:code-reviewer-*` as if they were valid `subagent_type` values — but Agent tool only accepts built-in types (general-purpose, Explore, Plan). Orchestrators mapping `dso:code-reviewer-*` → `subagent_type: 'dso:code-reviewer-*'` cause Agent tool to silently fall back to general-purpose, producing a generic agent that lacks the named reviewer's prompt. REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4's correction is 200+ lines deep — not reached when CLAUDE.md table appears authoritative. PARTIAL FIX APPLIED (commit 616a684a): CLAUDE.md dispatch table header now clarifies `dso:*` labels are file identifiers, not subagent_type. REMAINING: sprint SKILL.md Phase 5 Step 7 should add inline callout "DISPATCH PATTERN: Read REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4 inline before dispatching. Use subagent_type: 'general-purpose' — NOT the dso:code-reviewer-* label." Confidence: high. Minimal-fix applied: true.
